description: Moves the marker. If position is given in 3D format, {{hl|z}} coordinate is stored with the marker and will be used when marker is passed to commands like [[createVehicle]], [[createUnit]], [[createAgent]], [[createMine]], [[setVehiclePosition]] for example. In case of an object, the object's model [0,0,0] is used.
name: setMarkerPosLocal

Item.desc: , [[Position#PositionAGL|PositionAGL]] or {{GVI|arma3|1.94|size= 0.75}} [[Object]]. In case of an object, the object's model [0,0,0] is used.
Item.name: position
